-----BEGIN PGP SIGNED MESSAGE-----

It seems '--build-headless' is horribly broken by WDDM.  Here is my
attempt to fix the build (not run-time tested).  This patch is also
available from here:

http://people.freebsd.org/~jkim/vbox-headless.diff

Cheers,

Jung-uk Kim
